findings.title: Sandbox cli-budget.json 'calls' counter is 1 higher than the documented figure
findings.detail: VERIFICATION.md's appendix and .vcsdd/features/blockrun-cli-docs/evidence/media-run-summary.json both state the sandbox ledger's calls moved 19 -> 28 after Phase 3/4 work. Live inspection of /Users/anicca/blockrun-cli-e2e-home/.blockrun/cli-budget.json during this review shows calls=29 (spent=0.5460020000000001, matching the documented 0.546002 to 6 decimal places exactly). The dollar figure that matters for money-safety is exact; only the call counter drifted by one $0-impact call after the evidence snapshot was written (05:57:40Z) and before the Phase-3 manifest was opened (06:11:30Z) -- plausibly one more $0 preflight/retry recorded during that window, consistent with the already-documented '2 preflight retries counted separately' pattern in VERIFICATION.md's own reconciliation note. No spend, cost figure, MD5, HTTP status, or tx hash is affected. Not blocking: the authoritative money-safety figure (spent) is exact; only a secondary bookkeeping counter is off by one and the underlying evidence chain (dollar amounts, hashes, URLs) is fully verified independently in this review.
